name: Rocky Road Fudge Bars
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIES:
1. Grease and flour a 13x9 inch pan.
2. Melt 1/2 cup butter and one square of unsweetened chocolate in a microwave or saucepan.
3. In a large bowl, mix melted butter mixture with 1 cup sugar, 1 cup flour, 1/2 cup chopped walnuts, 1 teaspoon baking powder, 1 teaspoon vanilla, and 2 eggs until well combined.
4. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
5. FILLING:
6. In a separate bowl, beat together 6 ounces cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, 1/4 cup softened butter, 1 egg, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla until smooth and fluffy.
7. Stir in 1/4 cup chopped walnuts into the filling mixture.
8. Spread the filling over the brownie layer.
9. Sprinkle with semi-sweet chocolate bits.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
TOPPING:
11. In a microwave-safe bowl, melt 1/4 cup butter and 1 square of unsweetened chocolate until smooth.
12. Add 2 ounces cream cheese and 1 teaspoon milk; stir until combined.
13. Stir in powdered sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla until the mixture is smooth.
14. Pour the topping over the bars.
15. Cool completely, then refrigerate before cutting into bars. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
